title: Meowz-only reward roles and stable custom selects
items: Filtered the Leveling reward-role picker to roles created through the Meowz dashboard instead of showing every editable role in the Discord server.
Added persistent bot-side role tracking with an audit-log backfill for recent dashboard-created roles, while keeping unrelated server roles outside the Leveling manager.
Changed the shared custom select so opening a searchable dropdown never automatically focuses its search field, and mobile keyboard height changes no longer close an open menu.

title: Polished Leveling role and reward management
items: Replaced the browser confirmation alert for removing reward mappings with a centered Meowz-styled confirmation dialog that explains exactly what will and will not be deleted.
Added safe Discord role deletion from the Leveling panel with exact-name confirmation and linked reward cleanup.
Added compact reward rows and clearer create, select, save and delete controls across desktop, tablet and mobile.

title: Reliable bot-side role creation
items: Completed the bot API support used by the Leveling dashboard to create editable Discord reward roles.
Removed the website-side direct Discord fallback so role creation stays behind the authenticated Meowz bot API connection.
Added a clear deployment-version error when the website is connected to an outdated bot service.
